Example_EN: Generally speaking, students prefer shorter homework.
Example_CN: 一般说来，学生更喜欢较短作业。

Example_EN: Solar panels generate electricity from sunlight.
Example_CN: 太阳能电池板从阳光发电。

Example_EN: The younger generation grew up with smartphones.
Example_CN: 年轻一代伴随着智能手机长大。

Example_EN: Thank you for your generous gift to the school.
Example_CN: 感谢你向学校提供的慷慨礼物。

Example_EN: Genetic testing can find risks for some diseases.
Example_CN: 基因检测可以发现某些疾病风险。

Example_EN: Mozart was a musical genius from a young age.
Example_CN: 莫扎特从小就是音乐天才。

Example_EN: Please be gentle when you hold the baby.
Example_CN: 抱婴儿时请轻柔一些。

Example_EN: He behaved like a perfect gentleman at the formal dinner.
Example_CN: 正式晚宴上他表现得像一位完美绅士。

Example_EN: Please speak gently to the frightened child.
Example_CN: 请对受惊的孩子轻声说话。

Example_EN: She showed genuine concern for her sick friend.
Example_CN: 她对生病的朋友表现出真诚关心。

Example_EN: He made a friendly gesture and offered us seats.
Example_CN: 他做了一个友好手势并请我们坐下。

Example_EN: Children like telling ghost stories around the campfire.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢围着篝火讲鬼故事。

Example_EN: A giant company bought the local newspaper last year.
Example_CN: 一家巨型公司去年收购了本地报纸。

Example_EN: She received a lovely birthday gift from her aunt.
Example_CN: 她收到阿姨送来的可爱生日礼物。

Example_EN: Children loved watching the tall giraffe at the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们喜欢在动物园看那只高大的长颈鹿。

Example_EN: I am glad to hear that you passed the driving test.
Example_CN: 听说你通过驾照考试我很高兴。

Example_EN: She stole a quick glance at her phone during class.
Example_CN: 她上课时偷偷瞥了一眼手机。

Example_EN: Climate change is a global problem for every country.
Example_CN: 气候变化是每个国家面临的全球问题。

Collocation: around the globe;world globe;on the globe
Example_EN: News travels quickly around the globe today.
Example_CN: 今天新闻迅速传遍全球。

Example_EN: The old stadium returned to its former glory after repairs.
Example_CN: 修缮后这座老体育场恢复了往日辉煌。

Example_EN: Put on a pair of gloves before you go outside.
Example_CN: 出门前戴上一副手套。

Collocation: soft glow;glow with pride;glow in the dark
Example_EN: A soft glow came from the lamp in the corner.
Example_CN: 角落里的灯发出柔和光晕。

Example_EN: Use a glue stick to stick the photos in the book.
Example_CN: 用胶棒把照片贴进本子。

Example_EN: Farmers keep goats for milk and cheese.
Example_CN: 农民养山羊取奶做奶酪。

Example_EN: Many people thank God when something goes well.
Example_CN: 事情顺利时许多人感谢上帝。

Example_EN: This job is a golden opportunity for recent graduates.
Example_CN: 这份工作对应届毕业生是绝佳机会。

Example_EN: They play golf every Sunday morning.
Example_CN: 他们每周日上午打高尔夫。

Example_EN: Online shops deliver goods within two days.
Example_CN: 网店两天内送达商品。

Collocation: govern a country;govern carefully;laws that govern
Example_EN: Rules that govern school life should be clear and fair.
Example_CN: 约束学校生活的规则应清晰公正。

Example_EN: The local government opened a new public park.
Example_CN: 地方政府开放了一座新公园。

Example_EN: The school governor visited classrooms last Friday.
Example_CN: 学校董事上周五参观了教室。

Collocation: grab a bag;grab the chance;grab hold of
Example_EN: She had to grab her bag and run for the bus.
Example_CN: 她只好抓起包跑去赶公交车。

Collocation: get a good grade;grade a test;ninth grade
Example_EN: She worked hard to get a good grade in maths.
Example_CN: 她努力学习想在数学上取得好成绩。

Example_EN: There has been a gradual improvement in her health.
Example_CN: 她的健康有了渐进改善。

Example_EN: The weather gradually improved after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后天气逐渐好转。

Example_EN: She will graduate from university next summer.
Example_CN: 她明年夏天将从大学毕业。

Example_EN: There is not a single grain of rice left in the bowl.
Example_CN: 碗里一粒米都不剩。

Example_EN: Add fifty grams of sugar to the cake mixture.
Example_CN: 往蛋糕糊里加五十克糖。

Example_EN: You made only one grammar mistake in this essay.
Example_CN: 这篇作文里你只犯了一处语法错误。

Example_EN: They stayed in a grand hotel beside the river.
Example_CN: 他们住在河边一家大酒店。

Example_EN: Grandparents love spending time with each grandchild.
Example_CN: 祖父母喜欢和每个孙子孙女相处。

Example_EN: She visits her grandparents every weekend.
Example_CN: 她每周末去看望祖父母。

Collocation: proud grandson;grandson of;look after a grandson
Example_EN: He is the proud grandson of a famous writer.
Example_CN: 他是一位著名作家的自豪孙子。

Example_EN: The university received a large research grant.
Example_CN: 大学收到一笔大额研究资助。

Example_EN: Please draw a graph to show the monthly sales.
Example_CN: 请画一张图显示每月销售额。

Collocation: grasp the meaning;grasp a chance;firm grasp
Example_EN: It took me a while to grasp the meaning of the poem.
Example_CN: 我花了一段时间才领会这首诗的意思。

Example_EN: I am grateful for your help with the move.
Example_CN: 感谢你帮我搬家。

Example_EN: The doctor looked at us with grave concern.
Example_CN: 医生以严肃关切的神情看着我们。

Collocation: force of gravity;gravity of;law of gravity
Example_EN: The force of gravity keeps us on the ground.
Example_CN: 重力使我们留在地面上。

Example_EN: Practice can greatly improve your speaking skills.
Example_CN: 练习能大大提高你的口语技能。

Collocation: greet guests;greet with a smile;greet each other
Example_EN: Staff greet guests with a smile at the hotel door.
Example_CN: 工作人员在酒店门口微笑迎接客人。

Example_EN: She sent a greeting card to her old teacher.
Example_CN: 她给以前的老师寄了问候卡。

Example_EN: I need to stop at the grocery store for milk.
Example_CN: 我需要去杂货店买牛奶。

Example_EN: The city has seen strong economic growth this year.
Example_CN: 这座城市今年经济增长强劲。

Example_EN: The shop offers a money-back guarantee for 30 days.
Example_CN: 这家店提供三十天退款保证。

Example_EN: A security guard checked tickets at the gate.
Example_CN: 保安在门口检查门票。

Example_EN: Students can ask teachers for career guidance.
Example_CN: 学生可以向老师寻求职业指导。

Example_EN: Please follow the safety guidelines in the lab.
Example_CN: 请遵守实验室安全准则。

Example_EN: He felt guilty about forgetting her birthday.
Example_CN: 忘记她的生日让他感到内疚。

Example_EN: Pollution can destroy the natural habitat of birds.
Example_CN: 污染会破坏鸟类的自然栖息地。

Example_EN: Would you like a slice of ham with your eggs?
Example_CN: 你的鸡蛋要配一片火腿吗？

Collocation: eat a hamburger;hamburger and chips;homemade hamburger
Example_EN: He ordered a hamburger and chips for lunch.
Example_CN: 他点了汉堡和薯条当午饭。

Collocation: hit with a hammer;claw hammer;hammer nail
Example_EN: He used a hammer to fix the loose shelf.
Example_CN: 他用锤子修好了松动的架子。

Example_EN: She left her leather handbag on the train seat.
Example_CN: 她把皮包落在火车座位上了。

Example_EN: She overcame a physical handicap to finish the race.
Example_CN: 她克服身体障碍完成了比赛。

Example_EN: Please handle this glass box carefully.
Example_CN: 请小心搬这个玻璃箱子。

Example_EN: He received a handsome offer from a tech company.
Example_CN: 他收到一家科技公司的优厚报价。

Example_EN: Please hang the picture on the wall carefully.
Example_CN: 请小心地把画挂在墙上。

Example_EN: True happiness often comes from simple daily joys.
Example_CN: 真正的幸福常来自简单日常乐趣。

Example_EN: Fishing boats returned to the harbour before sunset.
Example_CN: 渔船日落前回到港口。

Example_EN: I can hardly hear you because of the noise.
Example_CN: 噪音太大，我几乎听不见你说什么。

Example_EN: Smoking can cause serious harm to your health.
Example_CN: 吸烟会严重损害健康。

Example_EN: Too much sugar can be harmful to children's teeth.
Example_CN: 糖太多对儿童牙齿有害。

Collocation: live in harmony;in harmony with;sense of harmony
Example_EN: Different cultures can live in harmony in one city.
Example_CN: 不同文化可以在一座城市和谐共处。

Example_EN: The coach used harsh words after the poor performance.
Example_CN: 教练在糟糕表现后说了严厉的话。

Example_EN: Farmers hope for a good harvest after the long summer.
Example_CN: 漫长夏季后农民希望有个好收成。

Example_EN: The book warns against spreading hatred online.
Example_CN: 这本书警告不要在网上散播仇恨。

Example_EN: Wet floors are a hazard to visitors in the lobby.
Example_CN: 湿地板对大堂访客是危险。

Example_EN: His speech made headlines across the country.
Example_CN: 他的演讲成了全国头条新闻。

Example_EN: The company headquarters moved to Manchester last year.
Example_CN: 公司总部去年迁到曼彻斯特。

Collocation: heal a wound;heal quickly;heal the division
Example_EN: The cut on her hand began to heal after a week.
Example_CN: 她手上的伤口一周后开始愈合。

Example_EN: Loud music can cause hearing loss over time.
Example_CN: 长时间听大声音乐会损害听力。

Collocation: central heating;turn on the heating;heating system
Example_EN: Please turn on the heating if the room feels cold.
Example_CN: 如果房间冷请打开暖气。

Collocation: go to heaven;heaven on earth;thank heavens
Example_EN: Thank heavens the missing keys were in her bag.
Example_CN: 谢天谢地，丢失的钥匙在她包里。

Example_EN: It began to rain heavily just after we left home.
Example_CN: 我们刚出门就开始下大雨。

Collocation: garden hedge;trim the hedge;behind the hedge
Example_EN: Please trim the garden hedge before the party.
Example_CN: 派对前请修剪花园树篱。

Collocation: high heels;Achilles heel;heel of a shoe
Example_EN: She wore high heels to the formal dinner.
Example_CN: 她穿高跟鞋去参加正式晚宴。

Example_EN: A rescue helicopter arrived within ten minutes.
Example_CN: 救援直升机十分钟内抵达。

Collocation: go through hell;what the hell;hell of a
Example_EN: The long wait felt like going through hell.
Example_CN: 漫长等待感觉像经历地狱。
MemoryTip: hell：地狱，口语也表极度难受。

Example_EN: Always wear a helmet when you ride a bike.
Example_CN: 骑自行车时一定要戴头盔。

Example_EN: The library staff were extremely helpful today.
Example_CN: 今天图书馆工作人员非常有帮助。

Example_EN: The road was flooded, hence the long delay.
Example_CN: 道路被淹，因此延误很久。

Example_EN: She grows fresh herbs on the kitchen windowsill.
Example_CN: 她在厨房窗台种新鲜香草。

Example_EN: The castle is part of the country's cultural heritage.
Example_CN: 这座城堡是该国文化遗产的一部分。

Example_EN: Firefighters became local heroes after the rescue.
Example_CN: 消防员在救援后成为本地英雄。

Example_EN: Do not hesitate to ask if you need help.
Example_CN: 如需帮助请不要犹豫开口。

Example_EN: The cat likes to hide under the sofa when guests come.
Example_CN: 客人来时猫喜欢藏在沙发下。

Example_EN: There is a clear hierarchy in the large company.
Example_CN: 这家大公司有清晰的等级制度。

Example_EN: Please highlight the key points in your notes.
Example_CN: 请在笔记中标出要点。

Example_EN: I highly recommend this book for English learners.
Example_CN: 我强烈推荐这本书给英语学习者。
